ddls:
CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the license was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license issued (e.g., Full License, Provisional License) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider submitted their application */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement action */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the enforcement action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enforcement action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of enforcement action taken (e.g., Warning, Fine) */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of penalty imposed on the provider */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider achieved compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection occurred */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the inspection */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspector received certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the government program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the government program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for providers to participate in the program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of participating in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_programs" (
  "provider_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a provider and a program */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the government program's ID */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider enrolled in the program */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider terminated participation in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES government_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each STARS level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the STARS level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the STARS level */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for providers to achieve the STARS level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_levels" (
  "provider_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a provider and a STARS level */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the STARS level's ID */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider achieved the STARS level */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the STARS level expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_levels_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES stars_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geocoded_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geocoded location */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the provider is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the provider is located */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the provider's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the provider's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the provider's location */,
  "geocoding_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider's location was geocoded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "provider_count" INTEGER /* Count of providers in a given area */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area for which the statistic applies (e.g., county, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_docs" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document record */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., License, Certification) */,
  "doc_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was issued */,
  "doc_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score given by the parent or guardian (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint record */,
  "license_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider's license number */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id")
)
